entry.title: WhatsApp Chatbot for SAP Commerce application
entry.content:
With WhatsApp being an integral part of daily communication for many, integrating chatbots into this platform offers unparalleled convenience. Consumers can initiate conversations with businesses effortlessly, using a familiar interface they're comfortable with. Whether it's scheduling appointments, making reservations, checking order status, or ongoing/personalized promotions, the process becomes streamlined and accessible, catering to diverse preferences and lifestyles. It offers a treasure trove of benefits for both consumers and businesses

Cost-Efficient Operations

Implementing WhatsApp chatbots can significantly reduce operational costs for businesses. By automating routine inquiries and tasks, companies can optimize resource allocation and reallocate human agents to more complex issues requiring personalized attention. This not only improves efficiency but also minimizes the need for extensive manpower, resulting in substantial cost savings over time.

Data-Driven Insights

Chatbots are not just responders; they're data collectors and analyzers. By capturing user interactions and preferences, businesses can gain valuable insights into consumer behavior, preferences, and pain points. This data-driven approach empowers companies to refine their products, services, and marketing strategies, delivering more targeted and personalized experiences. Moreover, it enables predictive analytics, allowing businesses to anticipate customer needs and proactively address them.

Seamless Transactional Experiences

WhatsApp chatbots facilitate seamless transactions, enabling users to make purchases, payments, and bookings directly within the chat interface. Integrating payment gateways and e-commerce platforms simplifies the buying process, reducing friction and cart abandonment rates. Additionally, businesses can leverage chatbots to send order confirmations, shipping updates, and receipts, keeping customers informed at every stage of the transaction.

Scalability and Flexibility

One of the greatest advantages of WhatsApp chatbots is their scalability and flexibility. Whether catering to a handful of inquiries or managing thousands of interactions simultaneously, these chatbots can handle varying workloads effortlessly, ensuring consistent service quality irrespective of demand fluctuations. Moreover, they can be easily customized and updated to adapt to changing business requirements and market dynamics, providing agility and resilience in today's fast-paced environment.

Below is few interesting research result done by different marketing organization –

  • According to a recent study by ThriveMyWay, around 42% of B2C businesses have embraced WhatsApp chatbots.
  • In fact, if you set up a WhatsApp chatbot for your eCommerce business, you can significantly save on cost. Juniper’s research proved the same, mentioning that businesses can save $8 billion per year by integrating chatbots into their operations.
  • Cooby’s study found WhatsApp messages from brands have an open rate of around 70%.
  • McKinsey’s study also found that around 71% of customers want personalized interactions from brands.

Futuristic and evolving use cases-

  • Virtual Shopping Assistants - WhatsApp chatbots could evolve into virtual shopping assistants, providing personalized recommendations, assisting with product selection, and offering real-time support during the entire shopping journey. These assistants could utilize AI and machine learning algorithms to understand individual preferences, style choices, and purchase history to deliver tailored shopping experiences.
  • AI-Powered Customer Insights - Chatbots can gather valuable customer insights by analyzing interactions, sentiment, and preferences. In the future, they may incorporate advanced analytics and natural language processing to provide businesses with deeper insights into customer behavior, allowing for more targeted marketing campaigns, product development, and customer service enhancements.
  • Healthcare Support and Telemedicine - With the growing importance of telemedicine and remote healthcare services, WhatsApp chatbots could play a significant role in providing medical advice, scheduling appointments, and even monitoring patient health metrics. Integrating chatbots with healthcare databases and AI algorithms could enable more accurate symptom analysis and triage, improving access to healthcare services for patients worldwide.

Keeping in mind all the above objectives, we can integrate WhatsApp chat bot with SAP commerce application to significantly improves customer experiences and reduces communication barriers.
Below are few very common use cases in SAP commerce that can be integrated.
1. Order status check - User can start interaction to check their order status. Chatbot will ask for user email address and order number. Upon confirming those details bot will check the status for the given input and send it to user.
2. Get the list of personalized promotions - User can start interaction to get their personalized ongoing promotions. Chatbot will ask for user email address. Upon providing the email address bot will check for the eligible ongoing promotions and send those to the user.
3. Product Recommendation - Chatbot can tailor responses and suggest relevant products to users based on their preferences, behavior, and historical interactions with the platform.
4. Customer Support - Chatbot can handle common queries, provide product information, and guide users through processes.
5. FAQs and Self-Service - Chatbot can provide instant answers to frequently asked questions.

Technical Insight

For technical implementation we can leverage an AWS Lex Chatbot using a WhatsApp business profile to drive customer engagement. We will be using SAP commerce occ Rest webservices as webhook to respond to user queries. 

 

Conclusion

WhatsApp chatbots represent a paradigm shift in customer-business interactions, offering unparalleled convenience, efficiency, and engagement. By harnessing the power of artificial intelligence and natural language processing, businesses can elevate the customer experience, drive operational efficiency, and unlock new opportunities for growth. As technology continues to evolve, embracing WhatsApp chatbots isn't just an option, it's a strategic imperative for businesses seeking to thrive in the digital era.

entry.title: SAP Social Sabbatical – Reflections & Gratitude
entry.content:
Just before SAP Sapphire in Orlando this year, I returned from my SAP Social Sabbatical program in Kenya. I am sharing with you my take on this incredible program because I realize that many are not familiar with it, yet the program presents an amazing opportunity for all SAP catalysts and executives to drive positive change - both within our communities and for our personal and professional growth.

SAP Social Sabbatical is an award-winning portfolio of global volunteering consultancy programs that empower SAP employees to share their knowledge, skills, and expertise with non-profits and social enterprises all around the world. In its purest form, the social enterprise is a real, income-generating business, but one that has a clear social mission. It is a pioneering and burgeoning sector, numbering in the millions worldwide.
SAP is not a social enterprise, but we are inspired by them and our Social Sabbatical program is an opportunity to engage with these inspiring ventures and their visionary founders. It is also an opportunity to experience SAP's purpose - to help the world run better and improve people’s lives - on a very tacit and personal level.

To date, the program has positively impacted 7M+ lives, helped create 460+ jobs, and supported 531 organizations worldwide through 1,601 SAP employees, of which 47% have been our women colleagues. Within it, there are various global, regional, and local programs tailored for SAP executives and the talent in the Catalyst Development Program, so everyone can find an opportunity to volunteer for something suited to their skillset

Personally, I had stepped away from my day-to-day responsibilities for two weeks to participate in the Kenya program, but I came back with years of energy and positivity to give back to our business, our team, SAP and the communities we serve. That amount of motivation, drive and purpose, is the tangible outcome of our Social Sabbatical program I would like all of you to experience.

I met very young people who already know their potential, and who are incredibly capable. They are executing very strategic world-class programs and leveraging technology and AI as much as some of the most capable in our teams in SAP today. But, while globalization and technology have made education more accessible to all over the last couple of decades, they couldn’t offer access to equal local and global opportunities at the same pace. SAP stepped up to help through the best we have to offer – access to markets, our technology and our incredible and skilled talent.

I supported a social enterprise called Taka Taka Ni Mali, founded by one of Kenya’s most successful women entrepreneurs who was named the Woman Entrepreneur of the Year in Kenya in 2018. The name of her enterprise in Swahili means ‘Waste is Wealth’ as the business focuses on managing and recycling waste, with a vision to turn Kenya into an environmentally sustainable nation. The business relies on donors to fund their enterprise, but Mary, the founder, is intent on making Taka Taka Ni Mali a financially independent enterprise with sustainable long-term success.

We were tasked with helping the business explore monetization opportunities to self-fund its social mission. Two weeks later, two of my SAP colleagues and I, representing three different SAP Board areas, redesigned Taka Taka Ni Mali’s entire business model, identifying five key monetization opportunities, and building the financial model and business plan for two of them. The plan was adopted, and the execution started while we were still in Nairobi!
These two weeks had a massive impact on my personal growth too.

Being taken out of my comfort zone - from the daily hum and drum of the business world - and being thrown into a problem that affected the lives of the people in front of me, brought a new level of clarity, efficiency and personal motivation to resolve that problem! The importance of finding a personal connection between the problem and my motivation to solve it, is one of the key lessons from this experience for me.

I was also successfully reminded about the power of conviction – seeing the determination and the absence of fear to go after one’s conviction even in such challenging environments, reignited my personal conviction in the journey we have charted for our Digital motion. I come back stoked, knowing that a few determined individuals can indeed move mountains. We, on the other hand, are a +1,000 men and woman-strong team in the Customer Success Digital motion – our goals need to remain incredibly ambitious - because we CAN attain them.

SAP is setting an incredibly high bar in the industry with this program and I encourage you all to check if you are eligible to participate at least once in your career. Programs like these help us align our actions with the values we stand for and the culture we strive to uphold - where empathy and kindness can be, and are, executed in harmony with our grit and high performance.

I’ve always been proud to be an SAPer, but I’ve never been as proud as I am now!

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Plus-Pune (August 2024)
entry.content:
Greetings SAP Community in Pune & Mumbai! We have some exciting news to share with you!


We are thrilled to announce that the SAP Community events will be making a comeback in Pune & Mumbai, starting with the SAP Stammtisch Plus on August 30th, 2024.

This event is an excellent opportunity for SAP professionals, enthusiasts, and anyone interested in learning more about SAP technologies to come together and learn, network with like-minded individuals, and have fun.

Are you wondering what an SAP Stammtisch Plus event is?

SAP Stammtisch Plus is a local grassroots community event where SAP Community members come together to share knowledge about SAP-related topics. The event's primary focus is networking & discussions, with 2 or 3 sessions from community members.

Learn more about it at: SAP Stammtisch - what is it about?

What is in it for you?

Let’s cut to the chase, what will you get by attending or contributing to this event?

1. Networking – You get to meet like-minded tech folks and have more space for networking.
2. Learning     – You will learn about the latest SAP technologies from experts.


 

 

 

 

When?
30th August 2024 from 2:00 PM till 4:00 PM. Registration starts at 1:30 PM.

Where?
3rd Floor, Wing 2 Block 1, International Tech Park, Wagholi Village, Kharadi Road, Pune - 411014. Phone: + 91 20 41985101

Registration

Please register using the below link. - SAP Stammtisch Plus (konfhub.com)

Note: We have only limited seats available, so register ONLY if you plan to attend IN-PERSON on August 30, Friday in Pune.

Organizers & Volunteers:

  • @Pari1 
  • @Asutosh21 
  • @Shweta_Kadam 
  • @Nitin_Rakh 
  • @SmitaP1 
  • @ranjeetkumar07 
  • @Devkambli 


We hope to see you all there and look forward to an engaging and productive event. Don't forget to register using the link provided above to secure your spot. See you soon!

Best Regards
SAP Community Group – Pune
